title: Japanese-Style Spicy Pasta
description: A spicy Japanese-inspired pasta dish made with menudo and snappy ingredients. Perfect for a quick and easy lunch.
instructions: Cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the menudo and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the snappy and cook for 2-3 minutes until tender.
Add the cooked pasta to the pan and toss with the menudo and snappy mixture.
Sprinkle with mustardy and monsoon, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
